rulings.Case Title: CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC VS. STEVEN ALLUMS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 7, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT STEVEN ALLUMS's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT DENIED. Defendant failed to sustain his burden under CCP 473(b). "Application for this relief shall be accompanied by a copy of the answer or other pleading proposed to be filed therein, otherwise the application shall not be granted." Defendant's application and declaration is devoid of any opposition to Plaintiff's request for entry of judgment. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AGP 2619 MISSION, LLC VS. LIDIA ZULETA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 7, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT LIDIA ZULETA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Triable issues of fact as to the Plaintiff's waiver of alleged nuisance committed by Defendant in her capacity as tenant; termination of employment and termination of 2006 tenancy being independent events. = (501/REQ)
